Der blev oprtettet  Requirements Tracebility Matrix det må aldirg oprettes.

classification.inputText: [Speaker 1]: Alright. We're going to have a look at the workflow for technician. And in this workflow, he's going to arrive at the scene, and he has to check the physical surroundings for the installation of a pump. And in this check, he has to see if the pump is leaking. He has to see if the pump is installed correctly. If it's not, he has to contact the manufacturing department immediately so that they could come and make sure that it's will be installed correctly.
